w:r.w:t: : Jakhan Chowk, Rajpur Rd, Near Petrol Pump, Dehradun, Uttarakhand-248001
mount to be paid in words
1. Payment to be made within 7 days from invoice date.
2. Extra charges (State Tax, Night Halt, Extra Km) will be charged as per actual.
3. Vehicle will be provided as per the itinerary only.
4. No refund for unused days or cancellations post journey.
5. All disputes are subject to Dehradun jurisdiction only.
Subject to applicable laws of India.
